examples: People can smell a poser from a mile away.
All the mat files come in two different formats: for either Poser 4 or ProPack!
Being called arrogant is a terrible slur, it means that you're not only a failure, but a poser as well.
When I first met him, through an old friend in Los Angeles, I took him for a brilliant poser.
Put a daily calendar with a puzzle, problem, or poser on your desk.
